bio.name: Dinuja Thishean
bio.title: Cyber Security Undergraduate | SLIIT
bio.description: I am a Cyber Security undergraduate focused on secure software, vulnerability analysis, and practical web security. I build real-world projects and continuously strengthen both defensive and development skills.

about.headline: Building secure, reliable, and user-focused digital solutions.
about.summary: I combine cyber security fundamentals with hands-on web development to create projects that are both functional and resilient. My interests include secure coding, vulnerability assessment, and continuous learning through practical implementation.
highlights: Focused on cyber security and secure application development
Hands-on project experience with Python, Flask, Java, and web technologies
Strong collaboration and communication through academic and committee work

education.institution: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology

extracurricular.intro: National-level karate competitor with podium finishes from district and Western Province championships through the Sri Lanka National Championship—and leadership as school karate team captain.

items.text: Annual Inter-School House Meet — Karate: 1st place
Sri Lanka National Karate Championship — Under-21 & senior categories
Annual Inter-School Sports Meet — Karate: 1st place
Annual Inter-School House Sports Meet — Karate: Best Player
Annual Inter-School House Sports Meet — Karate: 1st place

experiences.title: SLIIT XStream 4.0
bullets: Volunteered on the finance track for SLIIT XStream 4.0—an IEEE-driven signature event—helping secure sponsorships, follow up with partners, and keep budgets transparent while the main programme showcased innovation on stage.
Worked alongside committee leads to align sponsor deliverables with event timelines so funding, perks, and printed collateral arrived before doors opened.

experiences.context: Sri Dharmaloka Central College · Commerce Society
experiences.title: Commerce Day
experiences.role: Commerce Society member · Media & English announcer
bullets: Served as an active Commerce Society member for Commerce Day—conceptualising, filming, and editing short-form videos that promoted the build-up and captured the atmosphere across our channels.
Stepped on stage as the English announcer—scripting transitions, welcoming guests, and keeping the programme flowing from opening remarks to the closing thank-you.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern, responsive portfolio with polished UI, dark/light theme support, and structured project storytelling for recruiter visibility.
outcomes: Designed a professional recruiter-friendly personal brand website
Implemented responsive layout and accessible navigation patterns
Deployed as a static site for fast loading and low maintenance

projects.title: Automated Vulnerability Scanner
projects.description: A Python and Flask-based scanner to identify common web vulnerabilities through automated test workflows.
outcomes: Automated repetitive web vulnerability checks for faster assessment
Improved readability of scan output for clearer issue triaging
Documented practical security workflows with project screenshots

projects.title: Hotel Reservation System
projects.description: A web-based hotel booking and management platform with structured reservation flows and backend service integration.
outcomes: Built reservation and room management workflows end-to-end
Integrated backend modules for practical CRUD operations
Strengthened understanding of scalable Java web application design

soft.title: Problem Solving
soft.description: Ability to analyze complex problems, identify root causes, and develop efficient solutions in technical and real-world scenarios.

soft.title: Team Collaboration
soft.description: Strong ability to work effectively in teams, share ideas, and contribute to achieving common goals.

soft.title: Communication
soft.description: Capable of clearly expressing ideas and technical concepts both verbally and in writing.

soft.title: Time Management
soft.description: Skilled in organizing tasks, prioritizing work, and meeting deadlines efficiently.

soft.title: Adaptability
soft.description: Quick to learn new technologies and adjust to changing environments and challenges.
